# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Complete Application Stack Template

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: CompleteApplicationStack

  Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      VpcId:
        Ref: VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: CompleteApplicationStackSubnet

  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      Engine: mysql
      MasterUsername: admin
      MasterUserPassword: password
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt VPC.SecurityGroups[0]
      DBSubnetGroupName:
        Ref: Subnet

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-abcd1234
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt VPC.SecurityGroups[0]
      KeyName: CompleteApplicationStackKeyPair

  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: CompleteApplicationStackLB
      Subnets:
        - !Ref Subnet
      SecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt VPC.SecurityGroups[0]

  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      VpcId:
        Ref: VPC

  Listener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn:
        Ref: LoadBalancer
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: forward
          TargetGroupArn:
            Ref: TargetGroup

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: complete-application-stack-bucket

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Description: ID of the VPC
  RDSInstanceARN:
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.ARN
    Description: ARN of the RDS instance
  EC2InstanceId:
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
    Description: ID of the EC2 instance
  LoadBalancerDNSName:
    Value: !GetAtt LoadBalancer.DNSName
    Description: DNS name of the load balancer
